nasb.text: For every boot of the booted warrior in the battle tumult, And cloak rolled in blood, will be for burning, fuel for the fire.

esv.text: For every boot of the tramping warrior in battle tumult and every garment rolled in blood will be burned as fuel for the fire.

cnv.text: 因為戰士在戰爭喧嚷中所穿的靴，和輥在血中的袍，都必燒毀，成了燒火的燃料。

ccb.text: 战士的靴子和染血的征袍都要被丢进火里烧掉。

csbs.text: 每一个在战乱中所穿的军靴和滚在血中的战袍， 都必烧毁，成为烧火的燃料。
